channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Court rejects request to sideline San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender and thus stronger, posing a safety risk to t
item.dc:creator: AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bird flu virus was found in raw milk. What to know about the risks
item.description: The detection of bird flu virus this week in a batch of unpasteurized milk sold in California underscores what health experts say are the known and potential risks of the products.
item.dc:creator: Jonel Aleccia, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thanksgiving Travel Latest: TSA braces for ‘busiest ever’ holiday
item.description: The Thanksgiving travel rush is expected to be bigger than ever this year. AAA predicts that nearly 80 million people in the U.S. will venture at least 50 miles (80 kilometers) from home between Tuesday and next Monday. Another round of wintry weather could complicate travel, though.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Charlotte airport workers stop strike amid pay dispute
item.description: Employees went on strike Monday to protest their current wages, but have returned to work despite the situation remaining unsolved.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Biden's public lands director named to lead environmental group
item.description: BILLINGS, Mont. (AP) — A senior official in President Joe Biden's administration who oversaw its contentious efforts to address climate change by curbing oil drilling on federal lands while expanding renewable power was named Tuesday as the next president of a prominent environmental group. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Israel approves proposed ceasefire with Lebanon's Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Tuesday recommended his Cabinet approve a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: JOSEF FEDERMAN, KAREEM CHEHAYEB and BASSEM MROUE Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Surveillance tech advances by Biden could aid in Trump's promised crackdown on immigration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump will return to power next year with a raft of technological tools at his disposal that would help deliver his campaign promise of cracking down on immigration — among them, surveillance and artificial intelligence technology that the Biden administration already uses to
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Garance Burke And Jesse Bedayn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mexican cattle imports suspended after New World screwworm detected
item.description: Mexico’s chief veterinary officer said they discovered the screwworm in a cow at an inspection checkpoint close to the border with Guatemala.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: American, Frontier planes clip wings at Logan International Airport in Boston
item.description: Officials confirmed that two planes operated by American Airlines and Frontier Airlines clipped wings on the tarmac at Logan International Airport in Boston on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A voting machine firm suing Fox News now wants to probe Murdoch family trust fight
item.description: Lawyers for a voting machine company that’s suing Fox News want to question founder Rupert Murdoch about his contentious efforts to change his family trust, the attorneys told a court Monday.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart ordered to pay former truck driver $35M after jury finds fraud claims false
item.description: A jury in California found Walmart defamed a truck driver with false claims of workers' compensation fraud and will have to pay the former worker more than $34 million in damages.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KRON4

item.title: Diddy uses Donald Trump's criminal case in bail argument
item.description: Combs’ lawyers said his pretrial speech should be evaluated based on the standard used in Trump's criminal case.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, Fox 5

item.title: Thanksgiving Travel Latest: Airport strike, staff shortages and weather could impact holiday travel
item.description: Airports and highways are expected to be jam-packed during Thanksgiving week, a holiday period likely to end with another record day for air travel in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Menendez brothers' resentencing request hearing pushed back to January
item.description: The Menendez brothers have waiting nearly three decades, and now they'll have to wait a little longer to hear their fates.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Bird flu detected in raw milk from California, state officials warn
item.description: The avian influenza virus has been detected in a retail sample of raw milk from a California-based raw dairy farm, California health officials confirmed Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Varela, WGN 9

item.title: Dictionary.com Word of the Year is very mindful, very cutesy
item.description: Dictionary.com was very mindful and very cutesy when choosing its 2024 Word of the Year. This year’s title went to viral sensation "demure," a word popularized by TikToker Jools Lebron. “In making the annual selection, Dictionary.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: MAP: Every state's favorite Thanksgiving side, according to Campbell's
item.description: The Thanksgiving turkey won’t be the star of the show in some households this holiday season, according to a recent study.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, WGN 9

item.title: Jack Smith files to drop Jan. 6 charges against Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith has filed a motion to drop all four felony charges against President-elect Donald Trump in connection with his effort to overturn his 2020 presidential election in the lead-up to the deadly Jan. 6 attack on the U.S Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly and Ken Dilanian, NBC News, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Macy's says employee hid up to $154 million in expenses
item.description: The company added that the person behind the conduct is no longer an employee and that the investigation didn't identify involvement by any other worker.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Time running out for Senate to pass Social Security Fairness Act
item.description: The House recently passed a Social Security bill but the Senate is running out of time to get it over the finish line.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KRON4

item.title: 1 dead after DHL cargo plane crashes in Lithuania; officials 'cannot rule out' terrorism
item.description: Lithuanian officials said they were investigating the cause of the crash, and "cannot rule out" terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Siarhei Satsiuk, WGN 9

item.title: Blue state gun crackdown called out as threat to law-abiding owners
item.description: Colorado's Proposition KK, which imposes an additional 6.5% tax on gun purchases, was "intended to kill small gun stores," the owners of Hammer Down in Wheat Ridge said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden pardons turkeys Peach and Blossom for his last Thanksgiving event
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday pardoned the turkeys Peach and Blossom for the traditional presidential pardon ahead of Thanksgiving, which marks the start of Biden’s last holiday season at the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KRON4

item.title: Father of Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles found dead near LAX
item.description: Ryan Kobayashi, father of a 31-year-old Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles nearly two weeks ago, was found dead near Los Angeles International Airport early Sunday morning, officials confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, WGN 9

item.title: GOP senator: Americans don’t care about FBI background checks for Trump nominees
item.description: Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-Tenn.), who was rumored to be on Trump’s shortlist to serve as Treasury secretary, said most Americans “don’t care” whether Trump uses the FBI to vet his nominees, something fellow Republican senators have demanded.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WGN 9

item.title: Airport workers strike in Charlotte
item.description: Employees at the Charlotte Douglas International Airport have gone on strike over wages during what’s expected to be the busiest travel week of the year with the Thanksgiving holiday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KRON4

item.title: GOP senators squirm over sex-related allegations against Trump Cabinet picks
item.description: Republican senators are squirming over the rash of sexual misconduct allegations against President-elect Donald Trump's Cabinet picks, which they fear will become a focal point of Senate confirmation hearings next year.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes fined over $14K for 'violent gesture' at Bills game
item.description: The fine comes after the star quarterback celebrated a touchdown pass with a hand gesture that appeared to imitate him holding a gun.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, Fox 5

item.title: You can get paid $2,500 to shop at Costco for a week
item.description: Attention Costco shoppers! How would you like to get paid $2,500 plus a free Costco membership to shop at your favorite store?
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, ABC 4

item.title: A man called 911 for help during a home invasion. Las Vegas police fatally shot him
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A Las Vegas man called for police help during a home invasion before an officer fatally shot him, according to authorities and 911 calls. Brandon Durham called 911 early Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Remains of Pennsylvania teen at center of 1973 cold case identified as investigation continues
item.description: Ruth Elizabeth Brenneman was last seen leaving for school more than 50 years ago. Now, her remains have been identified as the investigation into her disappearance continues.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, WGN 9

item.title: Chuck Woolery, former host of 'Wheel of Fortune' and more, dies
item.description: Chuck Woolery, the affable, smooth-talking game show host of “Wheel of Fortune,” “Love Connection” and “Scrabble” who later became a right-wing podcaster, skewering liberals and accusing the government of lying about COVID-19, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Russell and Hamilton give Mercedes a 1-2 finish in Las Vegas
item.description: An ecstatic George Russell had just won the Formula 1 race Saturday night when he exclaimed in his radio, “Vegas!” He was ready to start celebrating in America's party capital, saying he would skip his flight back to his home in the United Kingdom to make the most of his Las Vegas Grand Prix victory
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Will a winter storm hit the US over Thanksgiving week? Here's what forecasts show so far
item.description: WINDSOR, Calif. (AP) — Forecasters warned over the weekend that another round of winter weather could complicate travel leading up to Thanksgiving in parts of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: GODOFREDO A. VASQUEZ and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah city among the 10 'least sinful' cities in the United States
item.description: Denver was ranked as the No. 6 most "sinful" city in the U.S., ahead of cities like New York City and Miami in a new ranking released by WalletHub.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4
